title: verify command feature root
description: Non-runnable container bead for the full verify command feature. All implementation, testing, documentation, and review work is expressed as children.
acceptance_criteria: pypptx verify clean.pptx exits 0 and returns {"passed": true, "errors": [], "warnings": [], ...}
pypptx verify bad.pptx exits 1 when errors are present
Each of the 5 checks is covered by at least one test asserting it triggers correctly on bad input
Each check is covered by at least one test asserting it does NOT trigger on clean input
SKILL.md QA checklist updated: pypptx verify appears as step 1, before the thumbnail check
No Accenture-specific logic: no hardcoded font names, no template dimension constants, no locale-specific placeholder text patterns
